events.name: Bureaucratic Strain
events.description: Bureaucratic compliance has slipped, signalling administrative drift.
events.visible_report: Ministry reports describe delays in routine compliance and weakening enforcement.
events.true_cause: country.government_authority.bureaucratic_compliance has fallen below the warning threshold.

events.name: Legitimacy Crisis
events.description: A sustained drop in legitimacy provokes a public-confidence crisis.
events.visible_report: Editorials and polling lines describe a country losing public confidence in its leadership.
events.true_cause: country.legitimacy has fallen below the legitimacy-crisis threshold.

events.name: Budget Shortfall Warning
events.description: Stability decline coincides with a flagged budget shortfall warning.
events.visible_report: Finance briefings warn that revenue is failing to keep up with planned expenditure.
events.true_cause: Stability has slipped far enough that fiscal stress signals appear in the public reports.

events.name: Corruption Scandal
events.description: A bureaucracy-tied interest group's loyalty has slumped to a politically dangerous low.
events.visible_report: Press exposés describe a scandal damaging confidence in the bureaucracy.
events.true_cause: An interest group's loyalty has fallen below the corruption-scandal threshold.

events.name: Weak Intelligence Warning
events.description: Legitimacy has fallen to a level that exposes weak intelligence coverage.
events.visible_report: Intelligence reviewers note thin coverage in domestic affairs.
events.true_cause: Legitimacy has dropped far enough that intelligence shortcomings surface in public discussion.

events.name: Media Control Backlash
events.description: Heavy-handed information control sparks a backlash among interest groups.
events.visible_report: Independent commentary describes a chilling effect; an interest group reacts with high radicalism.
events.true_cause: An interest group's radicalism has crossed the backlash threshold.

events.name: Military Loyalty Concern
events.description: A flagged dip in central-government compliance prompts loyalty concerns.
events.visible_report: Defence-ministry summaries describe officers questioning current directives.
events.true_cause: Bureaucratic compliance has dropped far enough that loyalty concerns appear in military briefings.

events.name: Economic Slowdown Warning
events.description: A combined stability + legitimacy slip signals economic confidence loss.
events.visible_report: Treasury notes describe a sluggish quarter and fragile investor sentiment.
events.true_cause: Both stability and legitimacy have declined enough to flag the economic-slowdown warning.

events.name: Faction Radicalism Crisis
events.description: A faction's radicalism has climbed to a politically dangerous level.
events.visible_report: Reports describe an organised faction agitating openly against the current direction of policy.
events.true_cause: A FactionState.radicalism has crossed the faction-radicalism-crisis threshold (M7.2, RFC-090 §7.2).
